programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: A truck driver vanishes just months into her marriage, and detectives wonder if she's having second thoughts; crucial evidence points investigators toward a plot spanning multiple states.

programs.title: Fatal Attraction
programs.desc: A sixteen-year-old boy comes home to find his mother dead in a pool of blood; after learning that she may have had a stalker, police begin searching widely for the mystery man, only to discover that her killer is someone very close to home.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: Brazen armed robberies strike local businesses in a tranquil community in Wisconsin, and detectives find themselves with few clues to help them identify the perpetrators.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: A gifted high school cheerleader's plans for a bright future turn dark when she falls in love with an up-and-coming rapper and ex-convict.

programs.title: For My Man
programs.desc: A woman who is unlucky in love meets a smooth-talking older man and thinks she has finally found someone with whom to start a life.

programs.title: A Different World
programs.desc: Whitley plans to tell Dwayne that a relationship is possible -- but it may be too late.
